meta.name: Akunuri Vanaja
meta.title: Medical Coding Fresher
meta.tagline: Precision in Every Code, Excellence in Every Claim

hero.headline: Translating Clinical Bravery Into Actionable Data.
hero.subtitle: Detail-oriented Medical Coding Fresher with a strong academic background in Pharmacy, seeking to ensure accurate code assignment and maintain compliance with healthcare regulations.

bio: I am Akunuri Vanaja, a detail-oriented Medical Coding Fresher with a B.Pharmacy (CGPA 8.0) and comprehensive training in ICD-10-CM, CPT, and HCPCS Level II. I am eager to apply my knowledge of medical record analysis, healthcare compliance, and accurate code assignment to contribute effectively to a dynamic revenue cycle management team.

projects.title: Medical Coding Case Study Project
projects.description: Reviewed sample patient medical records, assigned ICD-10-CM diagnosis codes and CPT procedure codes based on documented conditions, and verified accuracy using standard guidelines.

projects.title: Clinical Documentation Review Project
projects.description: Analyzed healthcare documentation for coding completeness, identified documentation gaps, and practiced accurate code assignment through chart review exercises on simulated patient scenarios.

achievements: Completed training in Medical Terminology and Anatomy & Physiology.
Learned ICD-10-CM diagnosis coding and CPT/HCPCS Level II procedural coding systems.
Practiced assigning diagnosis and procedure codes using sample medical records.
Developed understanding of coding guidelines, documentation review, and claim processing concepts.
Gained exposure to healthcare compliance and coding accuracy standards.

experience.company: KVSR Siddhartha College of Pharmaceutical Sciences
achievements: Developed a strong foundation in pharmacology, human anatomy, and medical science.
Assisted in dispensing medications while ensuring patient safety.
Collaborated with healthcare professionals to support effective patient care.
Maintained medication records and supported pharmacy operations.
Followed healthcare compliance and documentation procedures.

contact.heading: Let's Work Together
contact.description: I am eager to apply my coding knowledge and contribute to efficient healthcare revenue cycle management. Please reach out if you have any opportunities!
